# Case Study: A spatially-complete $\delta ^{18}O$ dataset using Machine Learning methods

## 2. Data

### 2.1. BAS dataset

* The $\delta ^{18}O$ dataset has been generated by the British Antarctic Survey (BAS) as part of the AISIT project. It brings together a multitude of observational datasets.
* Downloaded from the BAS website <insert link here>
* Columns in the BAS dataset required for this analysis <create a table for this>:
    * Name : Column name
    * latitude ($^o N$) : "Latitude_[degN]"  
    * longitude ($^o E$) : "Longitude_[degE]"
    * temperature ($^oC$) : "Temperature_[degC]"
    * salinity (PSU) : "CTD_Salinity_[standard_salinity_units]"
    * depth (m) : "combined_depth_[meters_below_surface]"
    * $\delta^{18}O$ (%$_o$) : "DELO18_[permillle]"
    * date : "Sample_Date_[dd/mm/yyyy]"
